case_title: BARRANGO, PAMELA et al VS CHANG, KATIE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRANGO, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, KATIE CHANG, KETIEN $1,113.97 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,159.97, PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS BARRANGO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,113.97 FILED BY BARRANGO, PAMELA BARRANGO, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KATIE CHANG, KETIEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KATIE
